chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Transfer Application No.S-12 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.08.2022. Mr. Ayaz Khaskheli, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Khalid Saeed Soomro, Advocate for complainant. Ms. Safa Hisbani, Assistant P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- Applicants standing a trial in Sessions Case No.375 of 2021 emanating from Crime No.25 of 2019 registered at P.S Makhdoom Bilawal, District Dadu, have filed this application seeking transfer of the case pending before learned Ist Additional Sessions Judges / MCTC, Dadu, to any other Court of District Dadu, pleading harsh behavior of the Presiding Officer to them and lack of confidence on him. 2. Learned Counsel for the applicants stating aforesaid grounds has prayed for transfer of the case which has been opposed by learned Counsel for the complainant and learned Assistant P.G pointing out to an earlier order passed in Criminal Transfer Application No.S-22 of 2021 filed by the complainant, upon which the case was transferred to the present Additional Sessions Judge with direction to decide the same within two months. 3. Although, harsh attitude and lack of confidence upon the Presiding Officer of the Court has been alleged by the applicants but no specific precedent and necessary particulars have been cited. It is obvious that on some vague allegations this application has been filed which does not merit any consideration. In the circumstances, this application is dismissed and learned trial Court is directed to expedite the matter and decide the same as early as possible within a period of two months of this order.

It is obvious that on some vague allegations this application has been filed which does not merit any consideration. In the circumstances, this application is dismissed and learned trial Court is directed to expedite the matter and decide the same as early as possible within a period of two months of this order. JUDGE Shahid
